🔒 100% private — no upload

VaultConvert

Free, private file converter that runs entirely in your browser. Your files never leave your device.

HEIC → JPGHEIC to JPG HEIC → PNGHEIC to PNG WEBP → PNGWebP to PNG WEBP → JPGWebP to JPG PNG → JPGPNG to JPG JPG → PNGJPG to PNG SVG → PNGSVG to PNG AVIF → JPGAVIF to JPG

Why VaultConvert is different

Most online converters upload your files to a server, convert them there, and ask you to trust that they delete them afterwards. VaultConvert never does that. Every conversion runs inside your own browser using your device’s processing power, so your files — personal photos, documents, anything — never travel across the internet. No upload, no account, no watermark, no waiting in a queue.

VaultConvert — free file converters that run entirely in your browser. Your files never leave your device.
